title: Université PSL AI Policy Tracker Report - 2026-05-11
summary: Université PSL (Paris Sciences & Lettres) is a federal university comprising multiple grandes écoles. This crawl found no dedicated centralized PSL generative-AI policy page, but it did find an official PSL academic regulations PDF with an AI disclosure/plagiarism rule. It also found research-integrity guidance from BU Paris-Dauphine library, a PSL member-school source, covering transparency, authorship responsibility, data privacy, and AI limitations.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
PSL is a federal university; member schools maintain significant autonomy over academic policies.
No dedicated centralized PSL generative-AI policy page for students, teaching, or assessment was discovered in this crawl.

One approved claim is based on the official PSL academic regulations PDF; the other approved claims are based on BU Paris-Dauphine member-school library guidance, not PSL central administration policy.
French-language sources predominate; original French evidence is retained as canonical.
sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
